Fullscape v1.0.1 improves lyric coordination and cache reliability with LyricShiori.

- Coordinates bridge presence and per-track leases before provider requests, preventing Fullscape and LyricShiori from starting duplicate automatic searches.
- Honors LyricShiori manual-reset signals across every cache kind and safely republishes warm plugin caches after checking for resets.
- Keeps and caches a valid third-party match when one provider fails instead of discarding it or scheduling redundant retries.
- Prevents stale asynchronous loads and retired leases from overwriting newer lyrics or clearing a new bridge session.
- Uses longer bridge request timeouts and consistent manual, plugin, and fallback source priority.
